XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: “You’re nothing but filth to me. You’re my possession, my pathetic slave, and you’d bow at my feet when I ask you to,” he growled. “Go to hell, Alpha Xade.” I spat out. *** What’s worse than being rej...

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: There are things even love cannot do! If the burden is too much and stays too long, love bends, cracks, comes close to breaking and sometimes does break. I am willing to go through any length in order...

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: He loved her in the past and sacrificed everything for her. But her betrayal shocked him. He never expected that from her. He left her after being insulted by her and her boyfriend. He is back after a...
